display.name: Jellyfish Bloom
display.author: prism
display.blurb: A bioluminescent bloom of jellyfish drifting in deep ocean current, their soft pulsing glow synchronized to bass frequencies.

annotation.technical_notes: A dense field of bioluminescent jellyfish sprites is instanced and modulated across a 3D landscape using custom shapes and texture sampling. Per-pixel warp equations create an undulating wave motion driven by the audio's bass frequencies, while feedback trails in sampler_main with low decay preserve the delicate, glowing tentacles. The cyan and violet palette shimmers in response to high-frequency transients.
